creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
It fails here when running `make clean build stage' as a user:

(cd /s/freebsd-ports/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/work/stage/usr/local/share/netdisco-mibs && /bin/sh ./mkindex)
Creating mib_index.txt
./mkindex: cannot create mib_index.txt: Permission denied

There's a mib_index.txt in /s/freebsd-ports/net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs/work/stage/usr/local/share/netdisco-mibs with permission 0444.
